items.title: Extreme Heat conference cancelled due to extreme heat warning.

items.title: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
items.dek: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.
items.body: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.

items.title: Bondi Beach shooting hero pleads not guilty to alleged assault on his father
items.dek: Ahmed al Ahmed tackled one of the gunmen who killed 15 people at a Jewish event in December.
items.body: Ahmed al Ahmed tackled one of the gunmen who killed 15 people at a Jewish event in December.
